contests.title: Total Stability Achieved
contests.description: We’re pleased to announce that Civitai is now completely bug-free. Every issue has been resolved, every edge case handled, and everything is working exactly as intended. Generations are fast and flawless, uploads are instant, and LoRA training issues are a thing of the past. Truly, we’ve entered a new golden age of stability and perfection. As you can see, staff morale is at an all-time high.

metadata.title: Total Stability Achieved
metadata.content: We’re pleased to announce that Civitai is now completely bug-free. Every issue has been resolved, every edge case handled, and everything is working exactly as intended. Generations are fast and flawless, uploads are instant, and LoRA training issues are a thing of the past. Truly, we’ve entered a new golden age of stability and perfection. As you can see, staff morale is at an all-time high.

contests.title: Civitai Memberships Announcment
contests.description: Coinbase Commerce, which until now powered Civitai.com Memberships, has been retired. Civitai.com Yellow Membership purchases are now temporarily unavailable. We’re working on a crypto deposit-based solution. In the meantime, Memberships via credit card are available on civitai.green for PG and PG-13 content creation. Yellow Buzz can still be [purchased](https://civitai.com/purchase/buzz) via the crypto-deposit method!

metadata.title: Civitai Memberships Announcment
metadata.content: Coinbase Commerce, which until now powered Civitai.com Memberships, has been retired. Civitai.com Yellow Membership purchases are now temporarily unavailable. We’re working on a crypto deposit-based solution. In the meantime, Memberships via credit card are available on civitai.green for PG and PG-13 content creation. Yellow Buzz can still be [purchased](https://civitai.com/purchase/buzz) via the crypto-deposit method!
